automation.name: E.10 LP pipeline monitor
automation.goal: You are given a new LP row in inputs.row with fields Name (alias LP Name), Company, and LinkedIn URL. IMMEDIATELY call send_sms with to="+19722144223" and body="New LP: <Name> at <Company> � <LinkedIn URL>". After send_sms returns, call final_answer with text="sent". Do not browse the web, do not call any other tools.
